text:
alepulver    2006-10-31 17:25:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/gkrellm-timers Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This is a GkrellM2 plugin that allows setting of various countdown timers
  and stopwatches.
  
  Author: Christian W. Zuckschwerdt
  WWW: http://triq.net/gkrellm_timers.html
  
  PR:             ports/104359
  Submitted by:   Tobias Roth <ports at fsck.ch>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.250     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/deskutils/gkrellm-timers/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/gkrellm-timers/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/deskutils/gkrellm-timers/pkg-descr (new)
